candidates.why: Clear SG&A component above EBIT; populated and appropriate overhead bucket.
Would be an SG&A component, but preview is empty and the broader Sales and marketing line is populated.
Dedicated R&D expense above EBIT; per rule include in XSGA as well when separate so that XSGA-XRD removes it.
Subcomponent/detail of R&D; prefer the broader Research and development line.
Clear SG&A component above EBIT; populated and appropriate overhead bucket.
Appears to be a subcomponent/detail under Administration expenses; prefer broader populated line.
Appears to be a subcomponent/detail under Administration expenses; prefer broader populated line.
Operating overhead bucket above EBIT; acceptable SG&A-type component excluding separate impairments/D&A lines.
Specific restructuring item, less representative than broader recurring overhead bucket.
Too broad and appears empty; also subtotal-style bucket, not preferred when components exist.
Could be overhead-related, but standalone line has mixed sign and unclear overlap with admin/personnel buckets.
Personnel cost could be SG&A-like, but likely spans production and admin functions, risking overlap with COGS and selected components.
Balance sheet item, not period SG&A expense.

Balance sheet liability, not SG&A expense line.

variables.notes: CR:c|low|missing. No single explicit SG&A subtotal is available. Selected the main overhead components above EBIT. Included Research and development in XSGA_COMPONENTS as well because it is separately reported above EBIT and not obviously embedded in the other selected overhead buckets; this allows XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD to represent SG&A excluding R&D.
